creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text: This may have already been addressed by imp@ in https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=268376 . I can't verify what version of FreeBSD the jenkins server or kyua servers are running though, so I don't know if this bug happened before or after the enhancement was made to rm to ignore fts_read errors with rm -f.
